title: Pistachio Pudding Cake
description: Moist and creamy pistachio pudding cake, topped with a sweet and crunchy pistachio crust.
instructions: Prepare the pistachio pudding according to the package instructions.
In a large bowl, combine the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
Add the butter and mix until a crumbly mixture forms.
Add the pistachio pudding and mix until well combined.
Pour the batter into a greased 9-inch (23cm) round cake pan.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
Allow the cake to cool in the pan for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack.
Top the cake with additional pistachios and serve.
